[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110111 6
1 1010110 4
2 1011011 5
3 1010000 2
4 1111101 6
5 1011000 3
6 0000000 a
7 0100111 4

01 10 1001011 4
12 21 0101101 4
23 32 0100101 3
34 43 1011000 3 match 5
45 54 0100111 4 match 7
56 65 1110011 5
67 76 0000110 2
70 07 1001001 3

02 20 1100110 4
13 31 0001000 1
24 42 1111101 6 match 4
35 53 1111111 a
46 64 1010100 3
57 75 1110101 5
60 06 1001111 5
71 17 0000010 1

03 30 1000011 3
14 41 1010000 2 match 3
25 52 1011010 4
36 63 0001100 2
47 74 1010010 3
50 05 0111100 4
61 16 0000100 1
72 27 0101111 5

04 40 0011011 4
15 51 1110111 6 match 0
26 62 0101001 3
37 73 0001010 2
[completion]
